name: a v1.0 profile with no probes consumes zero probes and keeps the unchanged budget-based pick (back-compat)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-intake.sh" --answers p.json --partial --out v10.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile v10.json --out req.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>tt.err; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-recommend.sh" --requirements req.json --profile v10.json --out opt.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>rr.err; grep -q 'probes_consumed=0' tt.err && grep -q 'recommended=opt-balanced' rr.err && echo v10-backcompat-unchanged 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform on AWS with a CI/CD pipeline","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json
